title: Task graph visualization component with loading and error states
purpose: Displays task graph diagrams using MermaidPreview, handles loading states, errors, and provides zoom controls.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TaskGraphView that accepts project and session props and uses hooks for data fetching and UI state management.

steps.content: Fetch task graph data using the useTaskGraph hook.
Extract zoom level and related functions from the UI store.
IF data is loading, display a spinner with loading message.
IF an error occurs, show error message with retry button.
IF no diagram is available, display placeholder with explanatory text.
ELSE render the MermaidPreview component with the diagram and zoom controls.
